content: div id  attachment_587106  style  width  1550px  class  wp-caption aligncenter   a href    loading  lazy  decoding  async  aria-describedby  caption-attachment-587106  class  wp-image-587106 size-full  src    alt  Two people looking at the Intrinsic Flowstate interface on a computer screen.   width  1540  height  1000  srcset    1540w,   300w,   1024w,   150w,   768w,   1536w,   368w  sizes  auto,  max-width  1540px  100vw, 1540px      a  p id  caption-attachment-587106  class  wp-caption-text  Intrinsic Flowstate is a developer environment to build production-grade robotics.   Source  Intrinsic  p   div   p Just five years after spinning out from Alphabet Inc. s  moonshot factory,  Intrinsic Innovation LLC is joining Google LLC. The physical AI startup said that being part of Google will allow it to amplify its work across frontier AI, from research and development through deployment and daily operations, enabling industrial use cases in manufacturing and logistics.  p   p The companies did not disclose financial details of the transaction. As a distinct group within  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Google  a , the  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  company  a  will continue evolving the Intrinsic platform, using the capabilities of Google Gemini models and Google Cloud, as well as working closely with  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Google DeepMind  a .  p   p Wendy Tan White, the current CEO of Intrinsic, will remain in her position, reporting to Hiroshi Lockheimer, the chief product officer of Other Bets at Google. The rest of the unit s reporting and leadership team remains the same, an Intrinsic spokesperson told  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener   em The Robot Report  em   a .  p   p  The Intrinsic team has been working for years to enable access to intelligent robotics through a democratized platform, so more people can build and benefit from robotics applications,  stated White.  Combined with Google s incredible AI and infrastructure, we re going to unlock the promise of physical AI for a much broader set of manufacturing businesses and developers. This will fundamentally shift production, from its economics to operations, and enable truly advanced manufacturing.   p   h2 Intrinsic partnerships to continue  h2   p Intrinsic has partnered with leading companies since it spun out of  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Alphabet  a . Last year, it  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  launched  a  a joint venture with  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Foxconn  a  to build an AI-driven intelligent factory of the future, combining Intrinsic s  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  AI  a  robotics platform with Foxconn s electronics manufacturing expertise.  p   p Intrinsic and Google said they plan to integrate AI, robotics, and digital twins into modular automation. Mountain View, Calif.-based Intrinsic said it will also continue working with Foxconn and its other existing partners.  p   p Google has been focusing more of its attention on robotics this year. At  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  CES  a  last month, Boston Dynamics  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  announced  a  that it is working with Google DeepMind to make its Atlas  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  humanoid  a  smarter with its Gemini Robotics foundation models.  p   hr     div style  text-align  center    a href     img loading  lazy  decoding  async  class  aligncenter size-full wp-image-568305  src    alt  SITE AD for the 2026 Robotics Summit save the date.  width  728  height  90      a   div   hr     h2 Flowstate platform to continue evolving  h2   p Intrinsic offers  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Flowstate  a , a web-based development environment and simulation engine. It said Flowstate enables users to build applications with ready-to-use  building blocks of robotic behaviors  known as skills. Skills can be manually developed or AI-enabled, without the need for deep expertise and hundreds of programming hours, asserted the company.  p   p With a few clicks, users can launch intelligent robotic applications from  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  simulation  a  right through to real-world production in a fraction of the time it usually takes, according to Intrinsic. Flowstate can perform a range of tasks, such as identifying complex parts for assembly, automatically generating code for efficient robot motions, or delicately handling parts using force sensors.  p   p Intrinsic plans to continue evolving this platform. It said it built Flowstate to be software-, hardware-, robot-, and AI-agnostic so that developers can build the right system with the right assets for the job. The company claimed that its industrial-grade operating system will complement the AI research coming from Google.  p   p  At Google, we see the immense opportunity in bridging the gap between the digital and physical world   that is also true for intelligent robotics in industries like manufacturing and logistics,  said Lockheimer.  We re excited to welcome the Intrinsic team to Google, so we can bring breakthrough AI to more businesses and industries, at scale.   p   p Since it was founded in 2021, Intrinsic has expanded both internal R D and through acquisitions. In 2022,  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Intrinsic acquired the Open Source Robotics Corp.  OSRC   a . This is the for-profit arm of the Open Source Robotics Foundation   a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  OSRF  a  , the organization behind the Robot Operating System   a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  ROS  a  .  p   p  iframe loading  lazy  title  NEWSTON builds with Intrinsic to deliver an AI-enabled optical inspection solution to Burkert  width  740  height  416  src    frameborder  0  allow  accelerometer  autoplay  clipboard-write  encrypted-media  gyroscope  picture-in-picture  web-share  referrerpolicy  strict-origin-when-cross-origin  allowfullscreen   iframe   p   p The post  a href    is joining Google to advance physical AI in robotics  a  appeared first on  a href    Robot Report  a .  p
